name: KL Renovator
description: KL Renovator is the leading professional aircond service company in Kuala Lumpur and Selangor, Malaysia. Specialising in residential and commercial HVAC — chemical wash, chemical overhaul, gas top-up, troubleshooting, repair and new unit installation. 10+ years experience, 5,000+ customers, 500+ 5-star Google reviews. Same-day service available.

itemListElement.name: Basic Servicing / Routine Maintenance
itemListElement.description: Standard filter cleaning and multi-point diagnostic. Recommended every 3-6 months.

itemListElement.name: Pressure Chemical Wash
itemListElement.description: High-pressure chemical cleaning of evaporator coil and blower. Unit stays mounted.

itemListElement.name: Chemical Overhaul
itemListElement.description: Full unit dismantle and deep chemical clean. Best for water leaking and ice formation.

itemListElement.name: Gas Top-Up / Precision Balancing
itemListElement.description: R22, R410A and R32 refrigerant top-up with precision manifold gauge balancing. Leak check included.

itemListElement.name: Troubleshooting & Repairs
itemListElement.description: Capacitor, fan motor, PCB board, sensor, compressor diagnosis and replacement.

itemListElement.name: New Unit Installation
itemListElement.description: All brands. Includes 7ft copper pipe, wiring, drainage. Wall-mounted and ceiling cassette.

itemListElement.name: Ceiling Cassette Service
itemListElement.description: Commercial ceiling cassette servicing, VRF/VRV systems.

itemListElement.name: Dismantle & Relocation
itemListElement.description: Safe extraction and reinstallation at new location.
